message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle stickfigure
skinparam interfaceStyle rectangle

title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

actor Georgina
participant API-Server
participant etcd
participant Controller Manager
participant Scheduler
participant Power Operator
participant Kubelet
participant Power Node Agent
participant Power Optimization Library
participant K8s Objects
participant Kube-Proxy

subgraph Kubernetes Initialization
    Kubernetes Initialization
    1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
    2 save new state
    3 check for changes
    4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
    5 notify about pod w nodename=" "
    6 assign pod to node
    7 save new state
    8 look for newly assigned pods(s)
    9 bind pod to node
    10 start container
    11 update pod status
    12 save new state
endsubgraph

subgraph Power Manager Initialization
    Power Manager Initialization
    1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
    2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
    3 Reserve System CPUs
    4 Create Namespace
    5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
    6 Create CRDs
    7 Label nodes
endsubgraph

subgraph Power Manager Deployment
    Power Manager Deployment
    1 Deploy Controller Manager
    2 Deploy the config
    3 Set Shared Profile
    4 Deploy th Workload
    5 Deploy Pod
endsubgraph

subgraph Power Manager additional functionality
    Power Manager additional functionality
    1 Confirm Kernel version
    2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
    3 Deploy Controller Manager
    4 Deploy the config
    5 Set Shared Profile
    6 Deploy th Workload
    7 Deploy Pod
    8 Set Time of Day functionality
endsubgraph

subgraph P-State
    P-State
    1 Deploy Controller Manager
    2 Deploy the config
    3 Set Shared Profile and configure the P-State governor
    4 Deploy th Workload
    5 Deploy Pod
endsubgraph

subgraph C-State
    C-State
    Deploy the config
    Deploy Controller Manager
    1 apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    2 Set Shared Profile
    3 Deploy th Workload
    4 Deploy Pod
    5 Set C-State functionality
endsubgraph

subgraph Time of Day
    Time of Day
    Deploy the config
    Deploy Controller Manager
    1 apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    2 Set Shared Profile
    3 Deploy th Workload
    4 Deploy Pod
    5 Set Time of Day functionality
endsubgraph

legend "Legend"
    legend "Control Plane ~ Master Node"
    legend "Worker Node"
    legend "Power Manager System Setup"
    legend "Power Manager Configuration"
    legend "Power Manager Deployment"

@enduml
